title: wedelia urticifolia var. wallichii
intro: Wedelia urticifolia var. wallichii, also known as Wallich's yellow flower or Baheda, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia urticifolia var. wallichii include its ability to treat digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent diabetes. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
